texto: I've always loved silent movies. I recently saw 'Tilly's Punctured Romance' at the Academy, which is the first comedy made with Charlie Chaplin in 1914, and I sat there, and I couldn't believe that the entire audience of 2,000 people were laughing that hard from a movie made in 1914 - and there were no words; it was all faces.
explicacao: Citação de Taylor Negron sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I've always loved silent movies. I recently saw 'Tilly's Punctured Romance' at the Academy, which…” articula amor, believe, words em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como words e people.
